full_text:
Wang Fang 王方
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Fang (王方). Opened the gates of Chang’an, later fought Ma Teng and was killed by a young Ma Chao. Wang Fang was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Li Jue.
